titles.title: For the Lord Is My Tower (6)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For the Lord is my tower And He gives me the power To tear down the works Of the enemy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In a difficult hour He will crush the devourer And bring the powers of darkness Underneath my feet

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: (Blessed be the name of the Lord) Blessed be the name of the Lord Blessed be the name of the Lord God most high.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The name of the Lord is a strong tower The righteous run into it and they are saved The name of the Lord is a strong tower The righteous run into it and they are saved
